steps.title: Substitute the expressions
steps.content:
Use the given definitions of $a$ and $b$.
$$a-b=(7k+4r)-(10k-11r+5)$$

steps.title: Distribute the subtraction
steps.content:
Subtract every term in the second expression. The negative sign changes $-11r$ to $+11r$ and $+5$ to $-5$.
$$7k+4r-10k+11r-5$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content: Combine the $k$-terms and the $r$-terms. $$(7k-10k)+(4r+11r)-5$$ $$-3k+15r-5$$ The answer is A.
